creator: root@cooltrainer.org
text: Looks good, thank you! A comment on the patches known to be obsolete in the next upstream release (e.g. change_mem2) would be nice if you end up rolling a V3, since I'm not sure if the "WIP" here implies a 2.2.2 is imminent or not: https://sourceforge.net/p/ucon64/svn/2826/
